creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
I forgot to add BUILD_DEPENDS in Makefile.
This (whole) patch fixes error in setup.

2012/1/28  <miwi@freebsd.org>:
> Synopsis: [UPDATE] www/py-requests to 0.9.3
>
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: miwi
> State-Changed-When: Sat Jan 28 05:28:44 UTC 2012
> State-Changed-Why:
> Hi Olivier,
>
> I just tested the port in the tinderbox, it fails to build because of
> the wrong dependency,
>
> ==>  Extracting for py27-requests-0.9.3 => SHA256 Checksum OK for
> requests-0.9.3.tar.gz.  ===>  Patching for py27-requests-0.9.3 ===>
> Applying FreeBSD patches for py27-requests-0.9.3 ===>
> py27-requests-0.9.3 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/easy_install-2.7 -
> found ===>   py27-requests-0.9.3 depends on file:
> /usr/local/bin/python2.7 - found ===>  Configuring for
> py27-requests-0.9.3 Traceback (most recent call last):
>  File "setup.py", line 6, in <module>
>    import requests
>  File
>  "/usr/home/miwi/dev/ports/www/py-requests/work/requests-0.9.3/requests/__init__.py",
>  line 27, in <module>
>    from .models import Request, Response
>  File
>  "/usr/home/miwi/dev/ports/www/py-requests/work/requests-0.9.3/requests/models.py",
>  line 21, in <module>
>    from urllib3.response import HTTPResponse
> ImportError: No module named urllib3.response *** Error code 1
>
>
> net/py-urllib3 is not detected, can u please have a look thx.
>
>
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=164338



-- 
olivier
